case_title: WAHB ALAJI VS. TRANSCO CLAIMS SERVICES, INC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 75.00 - SERVED JUL-22-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSCO CLAIMS SERVICES, INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANSCO CLAIMS SERVICES, INC
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF ADDING TO CASE DEFENDANT: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALAJI, WAHB
ORDER RE:FILE DESTROYED PER AUGUST 19,2021 ORDER
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ALAJI, WAHB AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSCO CLAIMS SERVICES, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRANSCO CLAIMS SERVICES, INC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-07-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 IN ORDER FOR PLAINTIFF WAHB ALAJI TO AMEND HIS CLAIM TO NAME YELLOW CAB AS A DEFENDANT IN THIS MATTER. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF WAHB ALAJI & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE SAMUEL BRAY, JR., CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR TRANSCO CLAIMS SERVICES, INC. ALI SAEED WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS ARABIC SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ALAJI, WAHB AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSCO CLAIMS SERVICES, INC YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-30-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF WAHB ALAJI AND DEFENDANTS' REPRESENTATIVE SAMUEL BRAY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR TRANSCO CLAIMS SERVICES, INC. & YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO EITHER DEFENDANT, BUT MR. BRAY WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED CLAIM A TODAY'S HEARING AS TO BOTH TRANSCO CLAIMS SERVICES, INC. & YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. THE PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT AFTER PARTICIPATING IN A MEDIATION SESSION CONDUCTED BY STUDENTS FROM HASTINGS LAW SCHOOL. THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THIS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF WAHB ALAJI. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS TRANSCO CLAIMS SERVICES, INC. OR YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. PURSUANT TO THE COURTS NOV-07-16 ORDER THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THIS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. MURPHY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 08/19/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
